concept: Engineer a racing game where vehicles automatically transform between forms optimized for the current terrain without player input, but racers can override these transformations at the cost of engine strain. Courses wind through wildly diverse environments requiring dozens of transformations per lap, with optimal timing of manual overrides separating champions from amateurs. Vehicle customization focuses on transformation efficiency and specialized adaptations for particular terrain types rather than raw speed. Competitive modes include transformation lockout races where certain forms become unavailable after each lap, requiring increasingly creative driving strategies. The championship finale features a track specifically designed to exploit typical transformation algorithms, requiring near-constant manual overrides to achieve a competitive time.
